fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts floating-point shares to integers by simple truncation on line 78. This discards the fractional parts, causing the sum of the allocated integer units to be less than the total capacity.

spec.expr: sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == total

constraints.intent: The sum of integer-truncated shares must equal the total capacity.
The raw floating-point shares computed by the helper must sum to the total capacity.
In float mode, the returned shares must sum to the total capacity.
